case_title: HALLANAN, PAUL K. et al VS GANULIN, ELADIA DBA UNIQUE HOMES OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALLANAN, PAUL K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GANULIN, ELADIA DBA UNIQUE HOMES OF SAN FRANCISCO $345.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $390.00, PLAINTIFF HANCOCK IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
